zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian Erskine於1315年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金時，她的父親Sir William Erskine of that Ilk41歲，母親Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford47歲。她於1334年與John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollok在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1373年4月15日在蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian Erskine于1315年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾厄斯金时，她的父亲Sir William Erskine of that Ilk41岁，母亲Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford47岁。她于1334年与John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollok在英国苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1373年4月15日在苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Erskine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Erskine in Renfrewshire, first recorded in 1226 in the form Erskyn.
History: A family of this name have held a number of Scottish titles, including the earldoms of Mar, Buchan, Kellie, and Rosslyn.

variants.name: Erskin
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland and Fife): variant of   Erskine  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian Erskine was born in 1315, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, her father, Sir William Erskine of that Ilk, was 41 and her mother, Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford, was 47. She married John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollok in 1334, in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 15 April 1373, in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian Erskine est née en 1315, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir William Erskine of that Ilk, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollok en 1334, à Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 15 avril 1373, à Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian Erskine 1315 in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Erskine of that Ilk 41 und ihre Mutter Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford 47. Sie hat 1334 in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollok geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 15. April 1373 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Erskine è nata il nel 1315 nel Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir William Erskine of that Ilk, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford, aveva 47 anni. Lei sposato John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollok nel 1334, nel Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 15 aprile 1373, nel Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian Erskineが1315年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルスキンで生まれた時，父Sir William Erskine of that Ilkは41歳，母Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawfordは47歳であった。1334年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアケエルラバーオックでJohn Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollokと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1373年4月15日にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアケエルラバーオックで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Erskine(이)가 1315년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Erskine of that Ilk(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 1334년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 카이를레이베록에서 John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollok(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1373년 4월 15일 스컷랜드 드프리실르 카이를레이베록에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Erskine nasceu em 1315, em Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir William Erskine of that Ilk, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford, tinha 47 anos. Ela casou-se com John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollok em 1334, em Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 15 de abril de 1373, em Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian Erskine родилась в 1315 г. в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir William Erskine of that Ilk было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollok в 1334 г. в местности каирлавирокк, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 15 апреля 1373 г. в местности каирлавирокк, думфриессхир, Шотландия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian Erskine nació en 1315, en Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir William Erskine of that Ilk, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford, tenía 47 años. Se casó con John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollok en 1334, en Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 15 de abril de 1373, en Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, a la edad de 58 años.
